summary: GH-92 formal spec path is approved for the minimal Snapshot/RefMap/Evidence refs scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: GH-92 working tree passed `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm smoke:runtime`, `pnpm smoke:runtime:local`, `git diff --check`, JSON readability, `loom doctor`, `loom verify`, `loom suite validate --item GH-92`, `loom suite carrier validate --item GH-92`, `loom suite evidence validate --item GH-92`, and `loom fact-chain`; `loom build` is blocked by installed CLI path consumption for repo-local `tools/loom.py`, while the required global suite/carrier/evidence surfaces passed separately.
follow_ups: Do not expand this approval into persistent SQLite evidence storage, raw artifact capture, Viewer/handoff/Core-App owner facts, hosted browser, real account state, provider marketplace, anti-detection success claims, or cross-repo Core/App changes.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec/plan/evidence-map define a narrow minimal suite with valid not_applicable rationale for full-suite artifacts and present behavior, test, and fresh verification evidence for GH-92.

consumed_inputs.validation: loom suite validate; loom suite carrier validate; loom suite evidence validate; loom fact-chain
